description: CompositionGrey cotton and lycra mix fabric shorts, with branding on left thighFittingBody FitWash careHand wash or machine washPerfect for cycling, this cotton and lycra mix stretchable shorts from domyos is a great addition to the wardrobe. Soft and durable, this fabric wicks away sweat and heat, allowing your body to breathe and stay comfortably dry. Team this with a sports bra when exercising at the gym or pair it with stylish tops for casual, relaxed days.
